description: Execute V0.8.5 M3: The MCP Filesystem Proxy (Context Spoofing). Expose new MCP tools (cowork_read_file, cowork_write_file) that actively redirect file operations to the isolated headless Git Worktree created in M2, enabling zero-collision team concurrency.
scope: 1. Modify src/mcp-server/src/index.ts. 2. Import the worktree-manager functions. 3. Add 'cowork_start_task', 'cowork_read_file', 'cowork_write_file', 'cowork_list_directory', and 'cowork_finish_task' tools. 4. Implement logic: When a task is started, create a worktree. Read/write/list operations should redirect to this worktree if a task is active. When finished, commit, push, and remove the worktree.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO documentation updates (M4) in this phase. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this M3 progression.
